textByHashes.9887434134003dba2a8e849269d176c0a46a5601: Aye, I have that artefact in my possession.
textByHashes.ab907d19541181f499be8c97ee30d790b6956087: 'Tis very valuable, and not an artefact to be given away lightly.
textByHashes.3135425b9392409a9d79b1f1bd9e210ba5f44cc8: I would want to give it away only to one who is worthy and good.
textByHashes.2f3b27b108874c3f1b8230fb49c88115e0697b93: I shall set a test for you.
textByHashes.59410f0f310d46f0f859c997c53e55cf1b353de0: First I need you to travel to Port Sarim. Then go to the upstairs room of the jeweller's shop there.
textByHashes.be5bab7c4bc26545df3dbd4d03884beea992f52a: Well done. You have passed my test.
textByHashes.dc41b1be02560be82562687522705043318a975f: Here is Excalibur, guard it well.
textByHashes.08d6b4cb33d71f73c9df0f5be844ee7962aa1206: I am the Lady of the Lake.
textByHashes.d8c7591db6d89a0927e9c41408ff48dc19603646: ...But you have already proved thyself to be worthy of wielding it once already. I shall return it to you if you can prove yourself to still be worthy.
textByHashes.f8698a28a0c59971a75b73aa3964bb8e40855264: Why, by proving yourself to be above material goods.
textByHashes.d842e0dce528f8446ee1dda7587a18596d901075: 500 gold coins ought to do it.
textByHashes.69fd5e1d5a57c89c2c3dffa32db9fedfdfff3db2: You are still worthy to wield Excalibur! And thanks for the cash! I felt like getting a new haircut!
textByHashes.38b0c0b602ee81e0479070cb38d06d6137f3814d: Well, come back when you do.
